subcodes.first_line: O ye two sincere servants at the threshold of the One God! Rustam, pure in soul, hath hastened to the eternal realm, that pride of the righteous ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق درگاه احدیت رستم پاک جان بجهان جاودان شتافت و آنسرور راستان
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
